# MEOK Partner Programme

> White-label the EU AI Act audit at your brand. 30% rev share. £4,950 base, you set your retail price. 11-day close time.

## What's the offer

- 30% revenue share on every Article 50 audit you bring us
- £4,950 base audit price (you mark up to £8-12K)
- 11-day average close time
- 4-day audit turnaround
- 32 MCP servers in the compliance fleet
- Co-branded signed attestations
- England & Wales governing law
- 12-month term, 30-day notice

## How it works

1. Sign the MEOK Partner Agreement (MPA-2026-v1, 10 clauses)
2. Get co-branded receipt template
3. You bring the lead, we run the audit
4. 30% rev share paid monthly via Stripe Connect
5. Quarterly partner review

## Who this is for

- GRC boutiques (20-200 mid-market clients)
- Privacy consultancies (GDPR + UK GDPR)
- AI ethics practices (Conjecture / Apollo / SaferAI)
- AI assurance firms (Holistic AI / Aigen / AI Risk)

## Who this isn't for

- Anyone outside UK governing law
- Anyone wanting to resell the technology
- Anyone not willing to share the marketing list

## Sign up

Email hello@meok.ai with subject "Partner Agreement Request". 24h response.

## Company
CSOAI Ltd · UK 16939677 · hello@meok.ai
